headline: Globe Life (GL) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Momentum And Bermuda Reinsurance Plans
summary: Globe Life stock snapshot and recent performance Globe Life (GL) has attracted fresh attention after a recent stretch of gains, with the share price now around $149.68 and positive returns over the past week, month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Globe Life. The recent upward move sits within a broader upswing, with an 8.13% year to date share price return and a 24.50% total shareholder return over 1 year suggesting that momentum has been building rather than fading.
